_doc: Faithful replay: a UiPath.PDF.Activities ReadPDFText activity faults at argument validation with System.IO.FileNotFoundException 'Could not find file "<path>"' because the input PDF path does not exist on the robot host. The agent must read the missing-file signature as the cause (the input path), not blame the PDF content, OCR, or a workflow-logic bug. Signature captured verbatim from a local UiPath.PDF.Activities 4.3.0 run; workflow name and path scrubbed/neutralized. First-match-wins.

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback: any uip command not matched returns an empty array so the agent can explore beyond the recorded path without aborting.

expected_calls.description: Agent lists faulted jobs in the Shared folder to find the failing job (prompt gives no job key).
Agent fetches the faulted job to read the FileNotFoundException 'Could not find file' signature from the Info / Error log.
